titleStmt.title: SII 30.133: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 133. (A.R. No. 211 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara Temple-on the west wall King name not mentioned: Śaka 830: 908 A.D.

summary.p: It records the exemption of tax by of añjashṭasatam the sabha of Rājamallachchaturvedimaṅagalam at Tiruvēgambapuram for the land called Amaraṅkuḻi which was bought by Sivakkuṟi Kāmaḍiperumāṉ and his younger brother Perumāḷ from the sabhā of kammāḷas and donated for providing 2 nāḻi of rice daily to Sri Pōndai-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakarayāṇṭu Eṇṇūṟṟumuppatu tiruvekampappuṟattu rājamallac catirvvedimaṅkalattu Añcaṣṭaśatattu śabhaiyom paṭuvūrkkoṭṭattuk staṉ civakkuṟik kāmaṭiperumakkaḷe E mmurk kammāḷar sabhaiyom pakkal viṟṟuk koṇṭuṭaiya Amaraṅkuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟirupattaintu kuḻiyum Ikkammāḷar pakkal meṟcco
llappaṭṭa kāmaṭiperumānum Ivaṉṟampi perumāḷum viṟṟuk koṇṭuṭaiyarkaḷāyina Ivvamaraṅkuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟirupattañcu kuḻiyum Añcaṣṭaśatattu mānum perumānum vi laṭupāṭakaṅkaḷukku meṟkku kaliccaṅkālukku kaṟaikku Ikkā(l)loṭu maṭaiykkallu nikkiya mañcikkattil viṟṟuk koṇṭuṭaiya Irunūṟṟeḻupattaintu kuḻi
yumāka Iva ṟu kuḻiyum Ikkāmaṭiperumānum Ivaṉṟampi perumāḷum Emmūr śrīpontai mahādevarkku nicati Irunāḻi kuttalariciyā ttamaiyil I yum Iṟaiyiliyākap paṇittom Añcaṣṭaśatattu sabhaiyom pātatūḷi Eṉtalaimelana .
Digital edition of SII 30.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
